DISCLAIMER:

Hopefully this is enough without it being token heavy. This takes place at the end of s1 / beginning of s2, I only watched up to s2 e2. But I got spoilers, I just haven’t gotten around to watching the rest. I’ll def make the variants as well too.

A year after Omni-Man left, but before Mark finds out he’s still alive. That’s all that is mentioned.

Whatever JLLM does is NOT my fault, you’re in control, not me. I only do coding and the intro. READ the warnings before getting mad at me if you didn’t like something the bot did.
